title: Create TFMG: Industry
description: Adds giant production chains using realistic TFMG factories to extract resources and metals.
body:
## 🎯 Features
 
**Be sure to check out the gallery!**
### 🔥 Complete Aluminum Production Chain
**From Basalt to Aluminum Ingots:**
- **Bayer Process:** Extract alumina from basalt (with bauxite ore as rich alternative)
- **Hall-Héroult Electrolysis:** Produce molten aluminum from alumina using electrolyte mixture
- **Cryolite Synthesis:** Create essential electrolyte from alumina, crushed amethyst, and soda ash
- **Multi-stage Processing:** Sodium aluminate extraction → Aluminum hydroxide precipitation → Calcination to pure alumina
  
![Conversion of electrolyte mixture into molten aluminum.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/694fc4f91354fe59c839e474c6a1a44a563ab136.png)
### 🧪 Advanced Chemical Processing
**Integrated Chemical Systems:**
- **Caustic Soda Production:** Brine electrolysis for sodium hydroxide solutions
- **Soda Ash Synthesis:** Multiple processing routes (electrolysis + thermal decomposition)
- **Brine Distillation:** Salt water concentration and purification chain
- **Carbon Dioxide Integration:** Used in chemical precipitation reactions

![Making soda from caustic soda.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fcea60d3d1b731eb9da2c8dd8d638f60534e52d.png)
### 💥 Explosion-Resistant Construction
**Superior Blast Protection:**
- **Explosion-Resistant Brick Blocks:** High-temperature ceramic material with **2x obsidian's blast resistance**. Reinforced structural blocks for hazardous industrial zones

![Blast-resistant brick block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53419350cb84caf12600ab3b5841ae7cb30a3bda.png)

- **Advanced Refractory Mixture:** Special compound for high-temperature applications

![Recipe for blast-resistant clay.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc3182d37ba3c91a861a4d85c86c882d8c097dc4.png)

## 🏭 Production Mechanics

### ⚙️ Industrial Processing
**Using Create & TFMG Machinery:**
- **Vat Reactions:** Multi-stage chemical processes with temperature and catalyst requirements
- **Electrolysis Systems:** Dual electrode setups for aluminum and chemical production
- **Distillation Towers:** Brine concentration and purification
- **Mechanical Processing:** Crushing, mixing, compacting, and smelting operations

### 🔄 Resource Efficiency
**Smart Recycling Systems:**
- **90% Cryolite Recovery** during aluminum electrolysis
- **Soda Solution Recycling** back to soda ash production
- **Carbon Dioxide Capture** and reuse in precipitation
- **Slag Utilization** for sintered clinker production

## 🔧 Technical Integration

### 🎮 Game Systems
**Seamless Mod Compatibility:**
- **Create Integration:** Crushing wheels, mechanical mixers, heated mixing
- **TFMG Support:** Distillation towers, vat processing, advanced mechanics
- **Dynamic Recipes:** Automatic adaptation when Destroy mod is installed
- **Tag-Based Flexibility:** Multiple ingredient options using vanilla tags

**If Destroy is installed, a different recipe for explosion-proof clay is installed**
![If Destroy is installed, a different recipe for explosion-proof clay is installed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c086499ab1ccb0e41a505ddce62622a9c6fc4a30.png)

### ⚡ Processing Requirements
**Industrial-Scale Operations:**
- **Minimum Vat Size:** 9 blocks for realistic production scaling
- **Heat Management:** Temperature requirements for thermal processes
- **Precise Fluid Handling:** Millibucket measurements for chemical accuracy
- **Balanced Processing Times:** Realistic production rates

## 📦 Dependencies

**Required:**
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge
- Create
- TFMG (Create: The Factory Must Grow)

**Optional:**
- Destroy (enhanced explosion-resistant material recipes)

---

*No custom machinery! This addon uses existing Create and TFMG mechanics to deliver a complete industrial experience.*
